title: Commerce Ministry bans writing names of God on bags and packaging
author: Saudigazette
summary: Saudi Gazette reportRIYADH — The Ministry of Commerce has banned writing names of God by commercial establishments on anything such as bags, packaging, and materials that are destined for inappropriate
content_text:
Saudi Gazette report
In a statement on X account, he said that this decision comes out of a desire to revere and protect the Beautiful Names of God (Al-Asma Ul Husna). It is worthy to note that the Law of Trade Names, which was approved by the Ministry of Commerce a few months ago, stipulates that a trade name must not contain any name on the list of prohibited names, or the name of a governmental or semi-governmental entity, while adhering to the regulations for reserving or registering the name Saudi Arabia and the names of cities.
